voice.tone: calm, clear, slightly faster — engaging editor style

audio.music: low ambient synth, slow tempo, no percussion — matches narration pace
audio.sfx: subtle whoosh on scene transitions only
audio.music_note: Intro: 'In this weekly AI Chronicle — Will AI Take My Job — Editors View' — slow background music

visual.style: futuristic, minimal, clean — dark navy base, high-contrast fonts
visual.font_contrast: white and cyan on dark — maximum readability

slide_breakdown.1-10: Content slides — 10 scenes covering topic depth
slide_breakdown.11: Branding outro — That's a Wrap, logo, avatar, subscribe
